overall.description: A cinematic third-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night during light rain. The camera follows various characters through neon-lit plazas, sunken walkways, and illuminated tunnels surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers with digital advertisements.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated grassy plaza in a futuristic city at night. Characters in distinctive clothing stand and move across the grass mound near a tree and lamp post, while towering glass skyscrapers with digital billboards rise in the background through the light rain.

segments.scene_description: Moving from the grass onto wet paved walkways, the camera follows characters in white suits through a moderately crowded plaza. A digital kiosk stands on the right while an overpass bridge looms ahead, with neon reflections shimmering on the rain-slicked concrete.

segments.scene_description: The camera follows a distinctive character with a glowing purple umbrella through a narrow canyon of skyscrapers covered in bright neon billboards. The wet pavement reflects the colorful lights as pedestrians navigate the rainy night streets.

segments.scene_description: The camera descends a wide concrete staircase into a sunken plaza beneath an overpass structure. The lighting shifts to artificial sources under the shelter of the highway above, with palm trees and modern planters decorating the lower pedestrian level.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow pedestrian tunnel illuminated by orange arrow lights on the walls, creating a futuristic corridor effect. After walking through the enclosed space, the scene transitions back to the open street level where vehicles and city traffic become visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from an elevated green plaza into the neon-drenched depths of a cyberpunk city before emerging back into the urban traffic. It begins on a grassy mound beneath towering skyscrapers and light rain, moving seamlessly onto wet paved walkways where characters in white suits navigate a shimmering, crowded plaza. As the camera follows a figure with a glowing purple umbrella, the environment narrows into a canyon of bright neon billboards and reflective streets before descending a wide concrete staircase into a sheltered sunken plaza. The scene then shifts toward a tunnel entrance marked by glowing orange arrow lights and massive digital walls, drawing the camera into a futuristic enclosed corridor. Finally, the movement carries the viewer through the orange-lit tunnel and back out into the open street level where the city's vehicles and traffic reappear.
